title: Prove extension field axioms and Karatsuba equivalence in Lean4
description: Prove QuadraticExt and CubicExt satisfy CommRing/Field. Prove Karatsuba equals schoolbook multiplication. Prove norm-based inversion and order formulas. Proofs in proofs/GF2Core/Proofs/KaratsubaEquiv.lean and ExtFieldAxioms.lean. Success criteria: lake build compiles all extension field proofs.
